calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends provisions related to registration on the Sex, Kidnap, and Child Abuse Offender Registry.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>clarifies that an individual who has committed an offense in another jurisdiction that would require the individual to register on this state's Sex, Kidnap, and Child Abuse Offender Registry is required to register in this state; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
